title: Level 8: Lists & Tables
description: Data ko organize karna seekhein (Lists aur Tables ke saath).
guide:
Lists & Tables

Is level me hum seekhenge:

  • UL (Unordered List): Bullet points ke liye.
  • OL (Ordered List): 1, 2, 3 numbering ke liye.
  • Table: Rows aur Columns me data dikhane ke liye.

Code dekhein aur samjhein ki <tr> aur <td> kaise kaam karte hain.
